address_book.delete_confirm_body: Ma ka saarayaa cinwaankan buugga cinwaannada?
address_book.missing_info_body: Waddada iyo magaalada waa lagama maarmaan.
address_book.saved_unverified_body: Cinwaanka waa la kaydiyay. EasyPost lama xaqiijin karin, sidaa darteed hubi faahfaahinta ka hor inta aadan rarin.
address_book.saved_unverified_title: La Kaydiyay Iyada oo Aan La Xaqiijin
address_book.title: Buugga Cinwaannada
address_book.verified_body: Cinwaanka waa la xaqiijiyay oo la kaydiyay.
batch_shipments.confirm_buy_body: Iibso summadaha rarista ee shixnad kasta oo sax ah oo ku jira wadarkan.
batch_shipments.labels_ready_body: Summadaha isku darsan waa diyaar. Ma furaysaa hadda?
batch_shipments.no_batch_label: Wax wadar ah weli lama samayn.
batch_shipments.no_csv_loaded: Wax CSV ah lama soo shubin.
batch_shipments.rows_loaded_summary: {total} saf ayaa la soo shubay — {valid} way saxsan yihiin, {invalid} ayaa khalad leh.
batch_shipments.title: Shixnadaha Wadarta
claims.confirm_file_body: Gudbi sheegasho {claim_type} ah oo qiimo {amount} ah.
claims.description: Gudbi sheegasho ka dhan ah daboolka caymiska shixnad la caymiyay taasoo lumay, xumaatay, ama la xaday.
claims.missing_info_body: Koodhka raadraaca iyo qadarka waa lagama maarmaan.
claims.title: Sheegashooyinka
connect_agents.allow_spending_label: U ogolow wakiillada inay codsadaan iibsi (weli waxaa loo baahan yahay ansixintaada)
connect_agents.approvals_intro: Iibsi uu wakiil codsaday. Wax lama iibsan weli. Faahfaahinta waxay ka timid EasyPost, ma aha wakiilka.
connect_agents.clients_intro: Macaamiisha MCP ee soo socda ayaa laga helay kombayutarkan. Ku xidhiddu waxay ku darsataa gelin faylkooda qaabeynta; faylka jira horta waa la kaydiyaa, waxna kale isma beddelaan.
connect_agents.confirm_spend_body:
Iibso {carrier} {amount} {currency} habka {mode}?

Tani waxay ku baxaysaa lacag dhab ah haddii habka wax-soo-saarku firfircoon yahay.
connect_agents.manual_intro: Macmiil kasta oo aan kor ku qornayn, kan ku dar qaabeyntiisa MCP. Inta badan waxay isticmaalaan “mcpServers”; VS Code wuxuu isticmaalaa “servers”.
connect_agents.no_clients: Macmiil MCP lama helin. Isticmaal habaynta gacanta ee hoose.
connect_agents.safety_explainer: Wakiilladu waxay akhrisan karaan xogtaada, xaqiijin karaan cinwaannada oo isbarbardhigi karaan qiimayaasha iyagoo aan wax weydiin. Waligood si toos ah wax ma iibsan karaan: iibsigu wuxuu noqonayaa codsi aad halkan ku ansixinayso, faahfaahintuna waxay ka timaadaa EasyPost, ma aha waxa uu wakiilku sheegay. Wax kasta oo ka sarreeya xadadkan waa la diidayaa halkii loo gudbin lahaa ansixin. U dhig 0 si aad xadka u saarto.
connect_agents.title: Ku xidh wakiilada AI
connect_agents.unsupported_body: Ku xidhidhinta wakiilada AI ee MCP hadda waxaa lagu taageeraa oo keliya nooca si toos ah loo soo dejiyo ee Easy-Post Desktop. Waxay u baahan tahay in app kale uu ka bilaabo hawl caawimaad rakibaaddan oo uu wax ku qoro faylasha qaabeynta barnaamijyada kale, xirmada Microsoft Store-na labadaas si lagu kalsoonaan karo ma qaban karto.
connect_agents.unsupported_link: Nooca si toos ah loo soo dejiyo wuxuu ka helayaa easy-post.spencerfields.com. Wax kasta oo kale si isku mid ah ayey uga shaqeeyaan labada nooc.
connect_agents.verified_note: Faahfaahintan waxaa dib looga soo qaaday EasyPost iyadoo la isticmaalayo kaliya aqoonsiyada uu wakiilku bixiyay. Haddii aysan ahayn waxa aad filaysay, diid.
create_shipment.buy_needs_full_address: U bedel “Cinwaanno buuxa” si aad u iibsato qiimahan.
create_shipment.contents_explanation_lab: Sharaxaada waxyaabaha ku jira (lagama maarmaan u ah "Kale"):
create_shipment.customs_certify_checkbox: Waxaan xaqiijinayaa in macluumaadka la bixiyay ay sax yihiin
create_shipment.customs_group_title: Macluumaadka Caadiyada (lagama maarmaan u ah shixnadaha caalamiga ah)
create_shipment.customs_hts_hint: Ma u baahan tahay koodh canshuur? Isticmaal bogga Raadi HTS.
create_shipment.customs_intro: Shirkadaha gaadiidku waxay diidaan iibsashada summadka haddii aan la haynin macluumaad caadiyo oo dhamaystiran oo ku saabsan shixnad kasta oo tallaabsata xudduud caalami ah.
create_shipment.customs_validation_body: Shixnadkani wuxuu tallaabsadaa xudduud caalami ah. Marka hore dhammaystir qaybta caadiyada: nooca waxa ku jira, magaca saxiixiyaha, xaqiijinta, iyo ugu yaraan hal shay caadiyo ah oo leh sharaxaad, tirada, qiimaha, miisaanka, iyo dalka asalka.
create_shipment.delete_package_confirm_b: Ma tirtirayaa xirmada la kaydiyay ee '{name}'? Tan lama soo celin karo.
create_shipment.missing_addresses_body: Marka hore xaqiiji ugu yaraan laba cinwaan oo ku yaal Buugga Cinwaannada.
create_shipment.missing_name_body: Shixnadkani wuxuu tallaabsadaa xudduud caalami ah. Baaninta caadiyada dartay, shirkadaha gaadiidku waxay u baahan yihiin magac ama shirkad ku yaal labada cinwaan, kan laga soo diray iyo kan loo diray — marka hore mid uga dar mid kasta Buugga Cinwaannada.
create_shipment.missing_name_title: Magaca ama Shirkadda Waa Lagama Maarmaan
create_shipment.missing_phone_body: Shixnadkani wuxuu tallaabsadaa xudduud caalami ah. Shirkadaha gaadiidku waxay u baahan yihiin lambar taleefan oo ku yaal labada cinwaan, kan laga soo diray iyo kan loo diray — marka hore mid uga dar mid kasta Buugga Cinwaannada.
create_shipment.missing_zip_body: Geli lambar boostada meesha laga soo diray iyo meesha loo dirayba.
create_shipment.missing_zip_title: Lambarrada boostada waa loo baahan yahay
create_shipment.no_label_yet: Weli wax summad ah lama iibsan.
create_shipment.no_rates_body: EasyPost ma soo celin qiimayaal shixnadkan.
create_shipment.preview_failed: Sawirka sumadda lama soo rari karin. Isticmaal badhamada hoose si aad u furto ama u kaydiso.
create_shipment.preview_placeholder: Sumadda ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doonta marka la iibsado.
create_shipment.preview_unavailable: Sumaddan waa PDF mana lagu soo bandhigi karo halkan. Isticmaal badhamada hoose si aad u furto ama u kaydiso.
create_shipment.purchased_body: Summadka si guul leh ayaa loo iibsaday.
create_shipment.purchased_no_label: Waa la iibsaday, laakiin URL-ka summadka lama soo celin.
create_shipment.purchased_result_text:
Waa la iibsaday. Koodhka raadraaca: {tracking_code}
Summadka: {label_url}
create_shipment.save_package_dialog_labe: U magacaw xirmadan si aad mar dambe u isticmaasho:
create_shipment.title: Samee Shixnad oo Baadh Qiimayaal
create_shipment.zip_mode_note: Hubinta qiimaha kaliya. Iibsashada sumad waxay u baahan tahay cinwaanno buuxa labada dhinacba, sidaas darteed u bedel “Cinwaanno buuxa” si aad u iibsato.
dashboard.placeholder_text: Shixnadaha, raadraaca, buugga cinwaannada, iyo aragtiyaha warbixinta waxaa lagu daraa marxalado dambe oo dhismaha ah. Isticmaal Dejinta si aad u maamusho furayaasha API.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
donation_banner.message: Haddii EasyPost Desktop ay kuu faa'iido leedahay, ka fikir inaad taageerto horumarinteeda.
history.insure_dialog_prompt: Qiimaha la sheegay ee la caymin doono (tusaale, 100.00):
history.refund_submitted_body: Lacag celinta waa la codsaday. Shirkadda gaadiidku waxay xaqiijin doontaa si aan la isku xirin — isticmaal 'Hubi xaalada lacag celinta' si aad u hesho natiijada ugu dambeysa.
history.title: Taariikhda Shixnadaha
hts_lookup.intro: Raadi koodhadka Jadwalka Canshuurta La Isku Waafajiyay (HTS) ee baayaninta caadiyaadka, adigoo isticmaalaya xogta toos ah ee Guddiga Ganacsiga Caalamiga ah ee Mareykanka. Waa tixraac oo keliya, ma aha talo caadiyada ama sharci — kala soocidda saxda ah ee shixnadaada waa mas'uuliyaddaada.
hts_lookup.search_placeholder: Raadi hal kelme (tusaale, "waayer naxaas ah") ama lambarka HTS
hts_lookup.status_idle: Geli hal kelme ama lambarka HTS si aad u raadiso.
hts_lookup.status_live: Xogta toos ah ee Guddiga Ganacsiga Caalamiga ah ee Mareykanka.
hts_lookup.status_no_results: Wax koodhad HTS ah oo la mid ah lama helin.
hts_lookup.status_offline_cache: Ma khadka toosan — waxaa la muujinayaa natiijooyinkii hore ee la kaydiyay, kuwaas oo laga yaabo inaysan ahayn kuwa ugu dambeeya.
hts_lookup.status_searching: Waa lagu raadinayaa kaydka xogta Guddiga Ganacsiga Caalamiga ah ee Mareykanka…
hts_lookup.title: Raadinta Koodhka HTS
insurance.intro_text: Shixnadaha lagu iibsaday abkan, isticmaal badhanka Caymi ee Taariikhda halkii aad ka isticmaali lahayd foomkan. Foomkan waxaad isticmaashaa oo keliya summadaha laga iibsaday meel EasyPost ka baxsan ee aad weli rabto inaad caymiso.
insurance.missing_info_body: Koodhka raadraaca, shirkadda gaadiidka, iyo qiimaha waa lagama maarmaan.
insurance.title: Caymi Shixnad
license_gate.buy_soon_body: Iibsashada onlaynka weli lama heli karo. Fadlan mar dambe soo eeg.
license_gate.invalid_body: Furaha shatiga lama aqoonsan. Hubi inaad ka koobiday furaha oo dhan iimaylkaaga iibsiga, ama la xidhiidh taageerada.
license_gate.subtitle: Geli furaha shatiga ee aad ku heshay iimayl kadib iibsigaaga si aad u furto barnaamijka.
license_gate.title: Fur Easy-Post Desktop
mode_banner.production_label: ⚠ HABKA DHABTA AH — iibsashooyinku waxay isticmaalayaan lacag dhab ah
mode_banner.test_label: HABKA TIJAABADA — wax lacag gaadiid dhab ah lama qaadi doono
pickups.booked_body: Qaadistu si guul leh ayaa loo qorsheeyay.
pickups.missing_info_body: Dooro cinwaan iyo ugu yaraan hal shixnad.
pickups.no_rates_body: Qaadista waa la abuuray, laakiin wax qiimayaal shirkado gaadiid ah lama soo celin si loo iibsado.
pickups.reload_button: Dib u shub buugga cinwaannada / shixnadaha
pickups.title: Qaadista
purchase_confirm.warning_body:
Waxaad ku sugan tahay habka DHABTA AH. {description}

Tani waxay ka goyn doontaa lacag dhab ah akoonkaaga EasyPost. Ma sii wadaa?
reports.title: Taariikhda iyo Warbixinta
settings.label_applies_note: Waxay khusaysaa dirista cusub, oo ay ku jiraan kooxaha. Xamuulyahannadu waxay go'aamiyaan cabbirka sumadda marka la abuuro dirista, sidaas darteed tani ma beddesho sumadaha horay loo iibsaday.
settings.label_caveat_ups: UPS wuxuu soo celiyaa 4x7 haddii aan si kale loo cayimin. 4x6 wuxuu ka shaqeeyaa ZPL kaliya, marka laga reebo haddii Taageerada EasyPost ay furto 4x6 PNG akoonkaaga (dirista gudaha oo keliya). 4x7 iyo 4x8 waa sumad 4x6 oo lagu daray meel bannaan.
settings.label_caveat_zpl_only: LaserShip iyo OnTrac waxay taageeraan 4x6 iyo 4x8 ZPL kaliya.
settings.language_restart_note: Dib u bilaw abka si isbeddelka luqadda si buuxda u shaqeeyo.
settings.title: Dejinta
settings.webhook_checkbox_label: Daar u ogolow cusboonaysiinta webhook-ka (waxay u baahan tahay cloudflared)
settings.webhook_status_stopped: Ma shaqaynayo. La socodku wuxuu weli ku cusboonaysiinayaa polling mar kasta oo 5 daqiiqo ah.
setup_wizard.key_required_body: Geli ugu yaraan hal furaha API (tijaabo ama dhab ah) si aad u sii wadato.
setup_wizard.subtitle: Ku dheji furayaasha API-ga EasyPost hoos. Waxaa si ammaan ah loogu kaydiyaa maamulaha xogta xaqiijinta (credential manager) ee nidaamka hawlgalka mishiinkan — waligeed qoraal cad kuma jiraan, mana loo dirin meel aan ahayn API-ga EasyPost.
setup_wizard.title: Ku Xir Akoonkaaga EasyPost
tracking.column_last_checked: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la hubiyay
tracking.title: Raadraaca
